programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Doomsday
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans' time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Mind Control
programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: New World Order
programme.desc: An elite group of power-brokers may be trying to rule the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Alien Attack
programme.desc: Secret satellites. Death stars. The weaponisation of outer space. Are governments the world over preparing for an alien attack? And if so, why are we being kept in the dark?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Zombies
programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the papparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Car Explosion
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Party
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)
programme.desc: For the first time since Americans entered the war, Marines face Japanese infantrymen at Guadal Canal. In the jungles, two powerful armies clash in a six month battle that claims nearly 30,000 lives.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: German forces encounter Russian resistance.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)
programme.desc: In the North African desert in 1942, American fighting forces encounter the dreaded Rommel for the first time to stop the German war machine.

programme.title: Catfish UK: Jordan & Austin
programme.desc: After two years of chatting, Jordan believes Austin is the one. But every time they arrange to meet, Austin cancels. Can Julie and Oobah finally bring them together? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Jerry & Karla
programme.desc: Jerry needs help meeting his first love Karla. Karla claims to have already met Jerry but refuses to talk to him on the phone. Can Oobah and Nella find out if Karla is who she says she is? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Angelica & Jeroen
programme.desc: Angelica's been speaking to Jeroen online for three and a half years. After several failed attempts to meet, she's now desperate to find out if Jeroen is real? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Hayley & Alex
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Catfish US royalty Kamie to help Hayley finally meet Alex. But after five months of avoiding phone calls and cancelling on her, will she get her a fairy tale ending? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Levi & Will
programme.desc: Levi is convinced Will is his dream man and broke up with his boyfriend so they could be together. After always cancelling on Levi, Oobah and Nella suspect something fishy is going on. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Leanne & Jamie
programme.desc: Leanne is desperate to find out if online love Jamie is her Mr Right. After cancelling on her numerous times, Leanne wants Oobah and Nella to investigate and finally bring them face to face. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens In The AC
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Reunion Special
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mercenaries
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Tyler puts pressure on Cate to lose weight. Things boil over between Amber & Matt. Maci worries about Bentley's safety while in Ryan's care. Debra attempts to go into business with Farrah. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber's family questions Matt's intentions when his past is revealed. Catelynn leaves Nova under April's care. Maci and Taylor find their dream home. (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah realizes her relationship with Simon is over. Amber asks Gary for joint custody while Maci invites Ryan to hang out. Tyler's dad Butch is released from prison and meets Nova. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah asks her mom to watch Sophia for a month. Amber is blindsided when Leah doesn't want to see her and Maci doesn't want Bentley going over to Ryan's parents house every weekend. (S5, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah gets kicked out of a Hampton's White Party. Amber struggles with Gary's new visitation schedule for Leah. Catelynn and Tyler have their bachelor/bachelorette parties while Maci is frustrated that Taylor hasn't proposed.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah struggles with taking Sophia to visit Derek's family. Ryan is annoyed that Maci has all the control over Bentley. Catelynn deals with anxiety when Nova meets Carly.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: A look at the women surrounding Hitler once he came to power, and how they were held up as the Aryan Ideal to strive for once the Nazi dictator approved of their positions.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: How women were active - and often violent participants and perpetrators - in the conflict and its attendant atrocities - especially the Holocaust.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Focusing on the fanatical women who took Hitler under their wing and, through love and devotion, acclimatised him to high society to launch him to power, only to be left behind once he achieved it.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Cataloguing the many lovers of the Nazi dictator, and charting the unfortunate demise of all who dared resist his love, affection and sexual appetite.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: From The "Protection Squadron" To The SS State.
programme.desc: From the Protection Squadron to the SS State: Trace the rise to power of the SS as we examine several perpetrators. Who was recruited? And why was the SS attractive to men?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Essex
programme.desc: Welcome to Essex. With a huge club scene and an entrepreneurial spirit, it was a natural breeding ground for new and old criminals alike. Bernard O'Mahoney explores the consequences for what became one of Britain's most notorious criminal hotbeds.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Live By The Sword
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals. Do these people always deserve the harsh legal consequences and should society turn its back on them for their mistakes?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Die By The Sword
programme.desc: Continuing from episode 5, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the potential injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals.

programme.title: Britain's Toughest Towns
programme.desc: Glasgow has the highest murder rate in Western Europe .what makes Glasgow so different is the high proportion of murders that involve the use of a knife. In this programme we investigate why Glasgow is suffering from this knife epidemic.

programme.title: Britain's Toughest Towns
programme.desc: Nottingham is being plagued by a gun culture that is seeing an average of one person shot every week. In this programme we meet with drug dealers and the police officers who are trying to curb the escalating gun violence.

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Mohamed Atta: The Deadly Sleeper
programme.desc: Mohamed Atta was the pilot who flew the first plane into the World Trade Towers on September 11, 2001.

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Other People's Money
programme.desc: At the crooked Enron, home of the first Wall Street scandal, we expose the "smartest men in the room."

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Benidorm Bound

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Nana Joins The Gang
programme.desc: Sophie apologises for hitting Sam and the Geordies have a hilarious day out at a water park. The crew go clubbing with Abbie's Nana - exactly what they need to bring the family together. (S18, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Double Return
programme.desc: Sophie is lost for words when Aussie Alex makes a surprise visit. The house is proper buzzing when Holly returns and takes them to Newcastle Pride for much needed fun, drinking and dancing! (S18, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly Gets A Shock
programme.desc: Chloe takes Sam on a date that leaves a chill up his spine. Alex has to do some serious grovelling with Sophie, and Scotty T makes life awkward for Holly when he brings her ex on a job. (S18, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordie Fest
programme.desc: The family celebrates Abbie's 21st with the ultimate house party, and of course Abbie's Nana is invited! The family share an emotional farewell as their time together comes to an end. (S18, ep1)

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Arabia: Land of Illusions
programme.desc: The Arabian peninsula is an ancient land of illusion. Extreme heat seems to sap life out of every corner. Yet, tricks of the light and the art of deception make survival possible. Nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hampshire
programme.desc: They've got a sailor looking for his first home and a soldier who's about to be made homeless.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East London

programme.title: Arthur: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau
programme.desc: When Mary Moo Cow is cancelled, D.W. is devastated. How can television--or life as she knows it--ever be the same? Buster hasn't yet met Bitzi's new boyfriend, but he fears the worst. What if he is a Mom-stealer?

programme.title: Arthur: Fountain Abbey/Arthur Calls It
programme.desc: Muffy's devastated when she learns her great, great grandmother Mary Alice wasn't royalty, but a common maid. Pressure from his classmates has Arthur doubting his decision to call Buster out during a baseball game.

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!

programme.title: Arthur: 1001 Dads/Prunella's Prediction
programme.desc: When Buster insists that he will miss the Father's Day picnic because he has other plans, Arthur is convinced that he's really sad and embarrassed about his parents’ divorce. And Prunella predicts a gift of flashpants, the hot new fashion.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers
programme.desc: D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur: Speak Up Francine/Waiting for Snow
programme.desc: The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. Baby Bop is not sure she likes this idea at first.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crisis
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Depart
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk across Teletubbyland to watch some children paint some pictures in a very interesting and messy way. It’s time for Tubby Custard, but Po makes too much Tubby Custard and the custard goes all over Home Hill. Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and two children watch a robin in the garden. The Teletubbies are 'Calling Out!' Laa-Laa calls to Dipsy who is very far away, then they call to Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some girls live with their Mum and Dad on a boat. They show us inside the boat. The Teletubbies come out of the house. Tinky Winky and Po go left and Dipsy and Laa-Laa go right.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies run out of the house to listen to the Woof Woof sounds. The Teletubbies copy the sounds again and again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy jumps indoors, the runs off to watch Annie and her dad land yachting on a beach. The Teletubbies sing 'Come Back Everything' song when a big wind blows their favourite things away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making marks. They use paint and different objects to make a colourful picture.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A little boy goes for a ride on his Grandad’s motorbike and sidecar. In Teletubbyland, Po went to see Tinky Winky on her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children looking for Grasshoppers. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are jumping over different things.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning in Sunflower Valley and Benny arrives bursting with enthusiasm. He’s not needed in Bobsville today and he’s come to the Valley to help. Today, the team are building Mr and Mrs Bentley’s special new house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Built to be Wild
programme.desc: Yeeee-haaw! Its hoedowns and showdowns for Bob the Builder and his machine team as they hit the trail to the Wild West for their fourth feature length adventure - BUILT TO BE WILD!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park to celebrate the annual flower show. Molly has built a special statue of a horse for the occasion which is to be unveiled at the opening ceremony.

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are finishing refurbishing the old watermill ready to begin milling the first Sunflower Valley flour. Work is just about to start when Dizzy hears a squeaking noise coming from above. There are bats in the old mill!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop is keen to enter the town’s snowman competition, but a burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini’s needs fixing. Scoop is anxious when he sees the snowman that Mr Sabatini has made for the competition.

programme.title: Trains and Treehouses
programme.desc: Bob and his ‘Can-Do’ crew are back on site with a brand new adventure! Join Bob as he builds a train set for Mr Bentley as a birthday surprise and helps find a family of squirrels a new tree-house home.

programme.desc: Ann Widdecombe and Craig Revel Horwood, with their experts Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon, travel from Colyton in Devon through Somerset buying antiques and ending up at an auction in Southend-on-sea.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two of the Dragons, Deborah Meaden and Theo Paphitis, go head-to-head with the help of Mark Stacey and Thomas Plant, scouring the West Country for antiques starting in Honiton Devon and ending up at an auction in Crewkerne, Somerset.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Kirsty Wark and Alastair Stewart battle it out with aid from Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon. From Edinburgh to Falkland to St. Andrews, they head way south to Kent for auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tony Blackburn--60's DJ icon--and Toyah Willcox--an 80's pop phenomenon--take to the road with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. Their journey starts in the historic town of York and ends up with an auction in Stanstead, Essex.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Unique Throws
programme.desc: Laura Turner analyzes the unique and quirky throws of Jelle Klaasen and Andreas Nikolaou.

programme.desc: Jamie Owens joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to reflect on his unique career in both football and darts.

programme.desc: Jamai van den Herik joins Paul Nicholson to talk darts and reveal more about the promising young Dutch talent.

programme.desc: Niko Springer joins Paul Nicholson on Tungsten Talk to share his darts journey and what lies ahead for him.

programme.title: On the Oche
programme.desc: Scott Mitchell joins Jake Kenyon for a chuck and a chat.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who's Tyler? & UD, Maloney's Mickey, Shroud of Turin and Road Map Clues & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Casolaro, If the Truth Be Known & UD, Rest Stop Killer and Purvis Confession & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dying to Confess, Vince Foster, Walk-Ins, Missing Ex-Monk, Update: Thanks Big Brother and Aphrodisiacs.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: St. James' Ghost
programme.desc: This episode includes: St. James' Ghost, Ghostly Attraction, Where Is She Now? and Calling Dr. Fraud & UD

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jacqueline Poole
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Jacqueline Poole is assaulted and strangled in her home. The police find her body 48 hours later and launch their investigation.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Finding Amy
programme.desc: In Portland Maine, a young woman named Amy St. Laurent goes out one evening with friends. At a bar she meets a stranger named Jeff.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Decoy Dolly
programme.desc: Late one evening in suburban Louisiana, a young carpenter offers a lift home to a women he’s met in a bar. But after riding off with the stranger in his truck, Andre disappears into the night.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Nine Men's Misery
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Cumberland Library & Monastery in Cumberland, Rhode Island where \\"the practice of silence\\" has been disturbed by a brutal past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: An Officer and an Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Textbook Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to an abandoned school in Barnegat, New Jersey. Could the apparition of a beloved community teacher be luring children inside the building or are other spirits at play?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 200th Episode: Grant is Back
programme.desc: On this 2 hour special, TAPS celebrates their 200th episode by re-visiting one of their favorite and most haunted locations, Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum and by calling on old friends, Grant, Dustin and Joe.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantoms of the Opera
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Middleton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette and her team are called to a grade II listed building that spans over 900 years in an attempt to uncover the mysterious paranormal activity that is said to occur there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on their biggest challenge yet in a prison where many have lost their lives and some seem to have remained.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Out of Service, When I Was Big, The Greedy Investor, Seven Hours of Bad Luck, The Secret of the Coins.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Morning Sickness, The Curse of Hampton Manor, Wax Executioner, Blood Bank, Ring Toss.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: House of Shadows, One Hand in the Till, Teasdale's Motor Car, The Vision and the Grave.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: Strictly Sexual
programme.desc: Two successful women, sick and tired of dating and relationships, decide to keep two young men in their pool house for strictly sexual purposes. Starring: Amber Benson, Johann Urb, Kristen Kerr

programme.title: Funny Money
programme.desc: When Henry Perkins accidentally trades his briefcase with a man, he finds five million dollars inside. However, the cash draws in Mr. Big, who wants to reclaim his money.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: Indiscreet (1958)
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame

programme.title: A Chorus Line

programme.title: Apache Blood

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Murderer's Return

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Irresistible

programme.title: Looking for Mr. Wonderful

programme.title: The Titan

programme.title: End of The World

programme.title: Grace and Goliath

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Twin Terror

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Dingo Ate My Dream House

programme.title: Girlfriends: Operation Does She Yield
programme.desc: Ever since Monica left William, his life’s been a mess. He can’t work, eat or function normally. Because Joan, Maya, and Lynn feel responsible for driving Monica away, they decide they’ve got to do something to bring the couple back together.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A House Divided
programme.desc: When Lynn's (Persia White) new boyfriend Eldon (Kadeem Hardison), finds himself at odds with the church members over his choice of having Lynn as a girlfriend, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A magazine publisher working on a top-secret expose is murdered and it's up to Michael and the dead man's daughter to solve his mysterious death.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael pursues an elusive counterfeiter in a supposedly crime-free community, but is thwarted in his efforts by local authorities.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Someone is killing the great minds of the Helios intellectual society and its leader is determined to get to the bottom of it.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael wrestles with emotions from the past when he comes to the aid of a young woman he once loved, before he assumed his new identity.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Devon poses as a businessman while Michael investigates recent hijacking attempts against an alliance of local truckers.

programme.title: Skins: Cook
programme.desc: Cook pleads not guilty and is out on bail after beating someone up at a party.

programme.title: Skins: Katie
programme.desc: Katie turns to Emily to try to help their mother.

programme.title: Mr. D: Coach of the Year
programme.desc: Gerry figures he’s a sure thing for the school’s Coach of the Year award after his team wins the city championship.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Redemption
programme.desc: After losing his Xavier Academy job last season over the unfortunate Coach Keenan saga, Gerry finds himself subbing at a tough inner-city school.

programme.title: Mr. D: Educational Assistant
programme.desc: Gerry is assigned an educational assistant, Marty, who quickly becomes a new source of irritation in the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Wrestling For Love
programme.desc: When Lisa asks Gerry to cover coaching duties for the upcoming wrestling tournament, Gerry promises to bring home two trophies.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Runs A Sweatshop
programme.desc: Gerry hatches a new "get rich quick" scheme selling counterfeit One Direction merchandise when he learns the band is in town.

programme.title: Mr. D: Re-Tired of Marking
programme.desc: When Gerry is suddenly promoted from sub to full-time teacher, his initial thrill is quickly squashed by the realization that he's back to real teaching responsibilities.

programme.title: Mr. D: Duncan vs. Bailey
programme.desc: When Gerry learns that former Olympic champion Donovan Bailey is coming to town, he's determined to seek retribution for a long-standing bone he has with the track "star".

programme.title: Mr. D: Student Teacher
programme.desc: When Gerry and Simon get student teachers, Gerry's hands-off approach fails; Bobbi starts taking supplements; Emma's characters bear a resemblance to some of the staff.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Forge of Creation
programme.desc: Lili, Vorjak, and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth. Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons. Augur is on the run from volunteers, but sends a friend (Juliet) to help Liam while he's gone.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath
programme.desc: A college friend of Renee's resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facility's cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A Senator's daughter is found to have kryss in her system. Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production. They believe Federov is involved. Da'an is addicted to kryss.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Motherlode
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber. An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zo'or has on the mothership. When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Take No Prisoners
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members, Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer. Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Pirate's Curse
programme.desc: A seismic event opens the earth and send Marguerite and Roxton into a pit, where they discover a pirate's buried treasure...and his bones. A curse on the booty complicates matters.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Visitor
programme.desc: After Malone is attacked by a beast, he and Veronica meet her old friend Danu, who has also been injured. Danu goes missing, and the group travels to his village learning he is a werewolf.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Man of Vision
programme.desc: The five adventurers all experience visions of Summerlee, the companion they had presumed dead after he disappeared into a waterfall. They suffer injury and face danger as they pursue the vision.

programme.title: The Lost World: Into the Fire
programme.desc: The incredible occurs when a Navy airship flies over the plateau. Malone manages to climb aboard, but is ambushed once inside and meets the deceptive Captain Askwith.

programme.title: The Lost World: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: Marguerite, Roxton, and Challenger take the place of Askwith aboard his ghost ship and return to the day of its fatal departure in 1915. Back on the Plateau, Veronica chases down Askwith.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Travelers
programme.desc: Malone remains missing, and the explorers' search party crosses paths with a trio of travelers. Marguerite becomes taken with the dashing leader, especially when he offers her a way off the Plateau.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
programme.desc: Chiana leaves Moya and goes to 'grave planet' populated by reckless thrill seekers who play dangerous and life-threatening games.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E4 - Crackers Don't Matter
programme.desc: A visitor comes on Moya with a device that could cloak Moya. The crew welcomes him on board, but soon almost everyone is acting paranoid.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E5 - The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Chiana discovers a recording with Moya's original Pilot. After seeing the recording and realizing Aeryn was involved, Pilot orders Aeryn to leave Moya

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E6 - Picture If You Will
programme.desc: Chiana buys a picture in a store, which is more than it seems. The picture changes and shows Chiana what will happen to her.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 216
programme.desc: Is an axe more effective than a gun when you are swarmed by zombies? Can the force of many people bust down a door? Can you escape from a horde of zombies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 147
programme.desc: Can you escape an explosive shockwave by diving in water? Can you make a car bulletproof using nothing but phone books?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 189
programme.desc: Can a vehicle run as well on square wheels as it does on round ones? Can two cars stuck nose to nose really do the maneuvers shown in the film "Date Night?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 46
programme.desc: Myths tested: What is the best cure for seasickness? Is it more efficient to drive a truck with its tailgate up than down? Can sticking one's finger in a gun barrel stop a bullet?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 15
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is Jimmy Hoffa buried under Giants Stadium? Can the venom from a daddy long-legs kill a human? Can a jet engine launch a taxi into the air?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Furious Women Face Off!
programme.desc: Carl is here today to tell his girlfriend that he's been sleeping with her sworn enemy, Keisha. Next, Donte will tell his best friend, Quincy, that he's sleeping with his fiancé. Later, Janel and Nikkie are fighting over the same man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final three contestants must serve an entire dining room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay divides Hell's Kitchen between the two remaining contestants, who design a decor and a menu, then come up with names for their halves.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twelve aspirants try to impress Gordon Ramsay, as they compete for the post of head chef at a Las Vegas restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After a disastrous opening night, both teams prepare for the next challenge; a contestant starts to succumb to the pressure; a challenge tests food-preparation skills; another chef must leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams prepare breakfast for men and women of the US Armed Forces dining in the kitchen, one contestant falls seriously ill and another chef has to leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: When the losing team is unable to identify some commonplace items in a taste-test challenge, chef Gordon Ramsay orders a grotesque taste-testing practise that turns several stomachs.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Greenough, near Geraldton in Western Australia, some 400 kilometres north of Perth, will forever be associated with one the most horrific murders in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Predator: Leonard John Fraser
programme.desc: Serial killer Leonard Fraser was suspected of killing at least five women over a 17 year period but took the complete truth about his life of crime to his grave.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls
programme.desc: On the 6th October 1997, 14-year-old Lauren Barry and 16-year-old Nicole Collins disappeared while walking along a road near their home town of Bega, on the New South Wales south coast.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Lyndah's Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police.

programme.title: Operation Repo: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Twisted Love
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: The Game: The Confession Episode
programme.desc: Melanie musters the courage to reveal the mistaken DNA test results of Baby DJ, further driving a wedge in her marriage and sending Janay on the warpath.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Justine is babysitting her sister Michelle's eleven month old baby, Ameera, for two nights. The boys look forward to helping their mom baby-sit as long as they don't have to change diapers.

programme.title: Run's House: Mixed and Mastered
programme.desc: With their tracks finally mixed and mastered JoJo, Zach and Reggie, aka "Blackout," are ready to hit the streets and find a record deal.

programme.title: Run's House: Too Cool for Old School
programme.desc: To keep occupied while going to an engineer tech school in the city, JoJo begins an internship at Phat Farm to learn the family business.

programme.title: Run's House: When the Cat's Away...
programme.desc: Justine's Brown Sugar jewelry line is up and running. And better yet, the Home Shopping Network is interested in working with her. So it's off to sunny Tampa to put Justine's jewelry on air.

programme.title: Run's House: Slapped Silly
programme.desc: Every family has its pecking order and being the youngest sure has its drawbacks: like getting picked on, which makes Russy the target of his brothers and sisters annoyance.

programme.title: Run's House: Rev's Baby Girl
programme.desc: It's time for JoJo and his group, Blackout, to hit the studio and begin recording tracks for their record. However, JoJo, Zach and Reggie are discouraged by the list of producers Latchkey Recordings has available to them.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Comes Home
programme.desc: Rev and Justine return from visiting their adopted baby they'll soon be able to call their own. They get the family excited with the news that they will have a new sister living in the house in a few days.

programme.title: Run's House: Mind on the Road
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House: Bonless Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House: Pass The Frame
programme.desc: With the final mix of their debut album just around the corner, Team Blackout takes the next step in their pursuit of ultimate rap dominance: self-promotion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Big Boy, and Gracie
programme.desc: Marley and Me author John Grogan gets a new yellow Lab. Just like Marley, Gracie needs lessons in respect. Paul Frank Industries lets employees bring their dogs to work.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Buster, Holli, and Spike & Belle
programme.desc: Cesar cures Spike's depression with a new friend. An 8 year old blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix, is supposed to play the role of family alarm dog, but he does his job a little too well.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella
programme.desc: After being boarded for 5 months, American bulldog Bella evolved into a food, people, and dog aggressive pet. Owner Nate is scared he will have to euthanize her if her behavior doesn’t change.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up
programme.desc: A retriever mix, and wire hair fox terriers siblings, have turned into a combative pack. A Sharpei/Dobie mix drools excessively. Rottie mix Dexter travels to Los Angeles for a refresher course.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Angus Sinclair
programme.desc: Angus Sinclair, called Scotland's worst serial killer, is linked to the 1977 murders of two girls in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.109
programme.desc: While away in rehab, a woman claims her ex-husband neglected to pay rent and utilities and broke her bike/A man sues the mother of his child for overpayment of child support; she says he should consider it the back support that he never paid.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.100
programme.desc: An economic stimulus check is allegedly stolen by a woman’s ex- husband/A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for an unpaid loan to help him flip a house and for an unpaid parking ticket.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.46
programme.desc: Man defends against ex-girlfriend's claim of unauthorized use and damage to her Buick Regal, insisting it was a hit-and-run/Woman sues former friend for allegedly stealing belongings stored in her garage.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.193
programme.desc: Custody battle and bounced check drama escalate with Wal Mart "Amber Alert." Mother-daughter lawsuit ensues from car wreck involving hitchhikers.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.3
programme.desc: A mother confesses to buying alcohol for underage teens who get drunk, throw rocks at cars and are ordered to pay $18,000 in restitution/Court fines for selling cigarettes to a minor are disputed by feuding sisters.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.84
programme.desc: A contract between cousins to ‘share’ a Pontiac Grand Am ends with a fight over the return of the car with allegedly ‘missing’ speakers/A fight over a three-way gym membership leaves a young woman at odds with her ex-boyfriend and his best friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.8
programme.desc: Teenagers dispute damages after breakup: iPhone thrown, windshield damaged/Judge Judy illustrates loan with paper scraps as unwed mother sues child's father for startup loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.191
programme.desc: In a divorce battle, a woman loans $2,000 for legal fees. A karate school owner sues a motorist over a collision impacting business. Teens and moms dispute a traded Ford Mustang's value.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.197
programme.desc: Woman sues child's father for PlayStation III balance and harassment. 'Good Samaritan' sues former friend for student loan balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.58
programme.desc: Man and stepson suing ex-friend for iPod and necklace face weakened case due to internet slander. Woman demands ex-fiancé pay Home Depot card charges; he claims items used to fix her home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.52
programme.desc: A woman sues her daughter’s schoolmate and her teen goddaughter for damages to her property and an ambulance bill, resulting from an assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.86
programme.desc: Botched deal to trade babysitting for rent leaves ex-roommates fighting over dumped clothes and unpaid bills. Woman accuses friend of kidnapping her kids during her jail time, refuses to repay dental loan.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Negotiators
programme.desc: An inside look at 23-year-old Jarrett Jordan, a disturbed man who shot three people and barricaded himself in a house in Queens, NY. He had with him his four-month-old daughter and three hostages.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Stella Nickell of Auburn, Washington, was sentenced to 90 year in federal prison for poisoning her husband Bruce and Sue Snow, a Seattle bank manager with cyanide-laced Excedrin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: My Father's Killer
programme.desc: James Bernard Campbell entered SueZann Bosler's home, murdered her father and almost killed her. 48 HOURS follows SueZann as she returns to the crime scene and then focuses on her unusual crusade for justice.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Prisoners in Paradise
programme.desc: When Lois McMillen, a Connecticut artist was found dead on the British Virgin Island of Tortola in January 2000, four young American tourists were charged with her brutal murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!
